prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: investigation board. Story world: Midnight Lockbox. Premise: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next.. Setting: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels. Threat presence: The Quartermaster. Recurring motifs: unit tags, bolt cutters, time-lock stickers. Puzzle visual for "Unit Grid Reconstruction". Objective: Combine shared lock patterns to identify the real unit sequence.. Build layered clue board where each shard can be solved collaboratively.. Subgenre: supernatural mystery. Tone: GROUNDED. Immediate scene brief: Midnight Lockbox - Unit Grid Reconstruction Puzzle Board. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Show a physical evidence-board or clue collage with photographs, string, maps, stained paper, and marked surfaces. Prioritize tactile realism over readable text. Any writing should be minimal, blurred, or partially obscured.
source_prompt: Story: Midnight Lockbox (midnight-lockbox) | Hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels | Villain: The Quartermaster | Villain worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access. | Motifs: unit tags, bolt cutters, time-lock stickers. Puzzle visual for "Unit Grid Reconstruction". Objective: Combine shared lock patterns to identify the real unit sequence.. Build layered clue board where each shard can be solved collaboratively.
